nasb.text: But if you are without discipline, of which all have become partakers, then you are illegitimate children and not sons.

esv.text: If you are left without discipline, in which all have participated, then you are illegitimate children and not sons.

cnv.text: 作兒子的都受過管教。如果你們沒有受管教，就是私生子，不是兒子了。

ccb.text: 做子女的都会受管教，如果没人管教你们，那你们就是私生子，不是儿子。

csbs.text: 大家都有份受管教；你们如果没有受管教，那么，你们就是私生子，不是儿子了。
